testcase.classname: Contact Component-should disable submit button if form is invalid
testcase.name: Contact Component-should disable submit button if form is invalid

testcase.classname: Contact Component-should enable submit button when form is valid

testcase.classname: Contact Component-should call contactService.create on valid form submission

testcase.classname: Contact Component-should mark all controls as touched if form is invalid

testcase.classname: Contact Component-should include rideId in request only if visible and filled
